expectations.text: Skill does NOT emit a .puml code block on first turn
Skill asks at most one round of clarifying questions or uses propose-and-go
expectations.evidence: single round of questions, ends with 'Reply with the three answers'

expectations.text: Candidate diagram types proposed are trimmed to 2–3 (not all 9)
expectations.evidence: listed 5-6 candidate types (Architecture, Sequence, Class/ER, State, Deployment, C4) — not trimmed to 2-3

expectations.text: Elicitation question includes scope or participants, not just type
